introSection: Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Lompi Family Park in Batna, Batna, Algeria.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Lompi Family Park in Batna, Batna, Algeria.



Yellow track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
